name: Wild Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Water chestnuts, sliced and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions, omitting salt or substituting seasoned salt if desired.
2. Drain well and cool to room temperature.
3. Spoon the cooked rice into a large bowl.
4. Add chicken, grapes, water chestnuts, and mayonnaise.
5. Toss gently with a fork.
6. Cover and chill in the refrigerator.
7. Just before serving, add cashews if desired.
8. Serve on lettuce leaves or line a bowl with lettuce leaves and fill with salad.
